taxonomy: Thelycrania amomum is classified within the family Thelycraniaceae, an endemic plant family found in Australia. This family is part of the order Asparagales, which comprises various flowering plant species. The order Asparagales is further grouped into the subclass Liliidae, within the class Liliopsida.
